results.title: Williams-Sonoma Inc. AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Williams-Sonoma has positioned itself as a leader in retail AI transformation[1][2]. The company has deployed AI agents across its brand portfolio through Salesforce's Agentforce 360 platform, expecting to autonomously resolve more than 60% of chat inquiries[3]. CEO Laura Alber positioned AI as delivering results today, not just future opportunity, stating 'AI is not just a future opportunity for us; it is delivering results today'[4]. The company has developed an AI-powered 'culinary companion' nicknamed 'Olive' that helps customers plan menus, discover products, and execute recipes[5]. Beyond customer service, Williams-Sonoma has integrated AI across supply chain optimization, internal operations automation, and product development[6].

# Analyst, Marketing Business Intelligence
...
Williams-Sonoma, Inc. is a leading specialty retailer known for high-quality kitchen and home products. They are seeking a Marketing BI Analyst to support reporting and insight generation for their Digital Marketing teams, focusing on transforming data into actionable reporting to optimize campaigns.
...

- Exposure to digital marketing or advertising analytics concepts
...

...
- Working knowledge of SQL, including writing basic queries and joins
...
- Familiarity with data preparation or ETL concepts
...
- Exposure to Adobe Analytics or other web analytics platforms
...
- Basic understanding of site tagging and tag management tools (Google Tag Manager, Tealium, or similar)
...
- Introductory experience working with APIs or data feeds
...
- Strong Excel skills and comfort working with data sets
...
- Curiosity, eagerness to learn, and interest in growing a career in marketing analytics

results.title: Mou Debnath
highlights:
VP, Product & Applied AI Strategy @ Williams-Sonoma | AI Strategy, Product Leadership, Digital Commerce & Enterprise Transformation
...
I lead Product and AI Strategy at Williams-Sonoma, where my work sits at the intersection…
...
As a product management enthusiast in the retail tech sector, I lead global teams committed to delivering best-in-class digital experiences with a customer-first strategy. Together my team focus on several key domains including Digital Product Discovery, Technology Innovation, AI Product Center of Excellence, SEO, Registry, and Digital Design. In each of these areas, we prioritize customer needs, driving innovation and creating solutions that redefine the retail landscape. This approach not only boosts user engagement but also enhances overall business outcomes, setting new industry standards.
...
In my role as Head of Digital Product Discovery, I lead a proficient team of product and technology experts committed to creating a top-tier site search experience. Our focus is on integrating advanced semantic and vector search technologies, augmented by generative AI, to refine search relevance and significantly enhance our business KPIs. We take pride in having developed an in-house, AI-driven smart product recommendation engine, strategically designed to surpass the capabilities of leading third-party SaaS solutions. Currently, we are concentrating on tailoring product recommendations using the latest advancements in generative AI to offer a highly personalized user experience. Additionally, we have been instrumental in launching an innovative curated design platform. This platform is a hub for guided design and collaborative interactions, connecting designers directly with customers. Its standout features include shoppable images and videos, a 'shop by room' feature for design inspiration, and an exclusive influencer collaboration portal. This platform not only enhances user engagement but also solidifies our standing as pioneers in digital product discovery.
...
As the Head of Technology Innovation, I spearhead a dynamic team dedicated to leveraging emergingi technologies in line with key business objectives. My role involves a strategic partnership with venture capital firms and innovative startups, gaining insights into cutting-edge tech trends to stay ahead in the market. Key focuses of our team include pioneering work in Generative AI, conversational AI / commerce, and computer vision, aligning these technological capabilities seamlessly with our overarching business strategies to drive innovation. We have a rich history of exploring and integrating diverse technologies such as blockchain, cryptocurrencies, NFTs, AR/VR, and advanced automation technologies like RPA and IPA. Our methodology is rooted in rapid prototyping and an agile 'test and learn' approach, which accelerates time-to-market and fosters data-driven decision-making. This ensures our projects are consistently aligned with evolving business strategies, positioning us at the forefront of technological advancement.
...

🏆 Winner Spotlight | Team Ragebait
...
One of the standout teams, Team Ragebait, presented SurgeAI: Predicting Demand from Events, Influencers & Economics.
...
Their solution addressed a key gap in retail forecasting — while traditional models rely heavily on historical sales data, real-world demand today is influenced by dynamic external signals such as events, promotions, influencer activity, and economic trends.
...
To solve this, the team designed an AI-driven approach that brings together multiple demand signals:
...
• Event-driven demand using seasonality, promotions, and event intensity
...
• Influencer-driven demand uplift using social engagement and trend signals
...
• Economic-signal-based demand shifts using income growth, pricing trends, and city-level indicators
...
They leveraged advanced machine learning techniques to uncover complex relationships across these signals and improve demand prediction accuracy. AI also played a key role in generating synthetic datasets, designing meaningful features, and refining interactions between different demand drivers.
...
What stood out was their ability to move beyond traditional forecasting and think in terms of real-time, signal-driven demand intelligence — helping retailers reduce stockouts, avoid overstocking, and respond faster to emerging trends.
...
This is exactly the kind of innovation AI-THON was designed to foster.
...
Congratulations to Team Ragebait for bringing together AI, retail strategy, and practical innovation. #WilliamsSonoma #AIThon2026 #RetailInnovation #AI #DemandForecasting #FutureOfRetail #Innovation #CampusEngagement

# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.

...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...

highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...

- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...

...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...

...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development

Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.

Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.

This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.

As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:

Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.

Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...
- Provide technical visionand lead advanced development in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and simulation.
...
- Architect and deploy large-scale AI systems and autonomous AI agents — conversational assistants, predictive agents with tool-calling, and multi-agent orchestration systems using LangChain, Pydantic AI, and RAG patterns
...
- Deploy NLP pipelines at enterprise scale — semantic similarity across millions of records using BERT/SBERT embeddings and vector search (FAISS)
...
- Deep expertise in ML algorithms (XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, AutoML) and deep learning (PyTorch, transformer architectures).
...
- Production experience with NLP (BERT, SBERT, FAISS, RAG), computer vision (YOLO, CLIP), and time series forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet).
...
- Hands-on experience building and orchestrating multiple AI agents with LangChain, RAG, tool integration, and memory management.
...
- Multi-cloud ML platform proficiency — AWS SageMaker AND GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery, BigQuery ML).
...
- Strong Python skills (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) with containerization (Docker) and MLOps practices.
...
- Masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field AND 8+ years’ experience in data science or Machine Learning roles with demonstrated impact.
...
- PhD in AI, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Information Technology, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Econometrics, or related field with relevant industry experience.
